options.systemMessage: You are an expert HR recruiter and resume analyst. Return only valid JSON in the exact format specified by the output parser. Do not add any explanations or additional text outside the JSON structure.

You are an expert Technical Assessment Designer specializing in creating high-quality MCQ questions for technical interviews.
 
CRITICAL: Return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format specified. Do not add any explanations, markdown formatting, or additional text outside the JSON structure.
 
Ensure each question:

- Tests practical knowledge relevant to the job role

- Has exactly 4 options (A, B, C, D)

- Has one clearly correct answer

- Includes detailed explanations

- Follows anti-cheating best practices

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.hrSummary.result }} - Assessment Results: {{ $json.hrSummary.candidateName }} ({{ $json.hrSummary.score }}) from {{ $json.hrSummary.candidateCompany }}
parameters.bodyContent:
=

📊 Two-Stage Assessment Results

Preference Screening + Technical Assessment Complete

{{ $json.hrSummary.result }}

{{ $json.hrSummary.candidateName }} from {{ $json.hrSummary.candidateCompany }}
Position: {{ $json.hrSummary.jobTitle }} | Screening ID: {{ $json.quickAccess.screeningId }}

🎯 Two-Stage Assessment Breakdown

Stage 1: Preference Screening {{ $json.assessmentResults.surveyValidation.validationPassed ? '✅ PASSED' : '❌ FAILED' }}

Status: {{ $json.hrSummary.surveyValidationStatus }}
Survey Questions: {{ $json.hrSummary.surveyResponsesCount || 0 }} total ({{ $json.hrSummary.qualifyingSurveyQuestionsCount || 0 }} qualifying)
Completed: {{ $json.assessmentResults.surveyValidation.completedAt || 'Not completed' }}
Technical Assessment Unlocked: {{ $json.hrSummary.technicalAssessmentUnlocked ? 'Yes' : 'No' }}
{{ $json.assessmentResults.surveyValidation.validationPassed ? '
' + '

' + 'Stage 2: Technical Assessment ' + ($json.assessmentResults.scores.isPassed ? '✅ PASSED' : '❌ FAILED') + '

' + '
' + 'Technical Score: ' + $json.hrSummary.score + '
' + 'Grade: ' + $json.assessmentResults.scores.grade + '
' + 'Time Taken: ' + $json.hrSummary.completionTime + '
' + 'Questions Answered: ' + $json.assessmentResults.scores.total + ' MCQ questions' + '
' + '
' : '
' + '

Stage 2: Technical Assessment ⏸️ NOT ATTEMPTED

' + '
' + 'Candidate did not pass preference screening, so technical assessment was not unlocked.' + '
' + '
' }}

👤 Candidate Details

Name: {{ $json.assessmentResults.candidateInfo.name }}
Email: {{ $json.assessmentResults.candidateInfo.email }}
Company: {{ $json.assessmentResults.candidateInfo.company }}
Position Applied: {{ $json.assessmentResults.candidateInfo.jobTitle }}
Original Match Score: {{ $json.assessmentResults.candidateInfo.originalMatchScore }}%
Assessment Date: {{ $json.assessmentResults.completedAt }}
Survey Validation: {{ $json.hrSummary.surveyValidationStatus }}
Two-Stage Complete: {{ $json.hrSummary.twoStageComplete ? 'Yes' : 'No' }}

📋 Preference Screening Details

Survey Summary: {{ $json.hrSummary.surveyResponsesCount || 0 }} total questions ({{ $json.hrSummary.qualifyingSurveyQuestionsCount || 0 }} qualifying, {{ ($json.hrSummary.surveyResponsesCount || 0) - ($json.hrSummary.qualifyingSurveyQuestionsCount || 0) }} informational)
{{ $json.assessmentResults.surveyResponses && $json.assessmentResults.surveyResponses.length > 0 ? '
' + '

Individual Responses:

' + $json.assessmentResults.surveyResponses.map(response => '
' + '
' + '' + response.questionText + '' + '' + (response.isQualifying ? 'QUALIFYING' : 'INFO') + '' + '
' + '
Answer: ' + response.answer + '
' + (response.expectedAnswer ? '
Expected: ' + response.expectedAnswer + '
' : '') + '
' ).join('') + '
' : '
No survey responses collected
' }}

Note: Qualifying questions determine access to technical assessment. Informational questions are for HR reference only and do not affect scoring.

{{ $json.assessmentResults.surveyValidation.validationPassed ? '
' + '

📈 Technical Performance Analysis

' + '
' + 'Strong Areas:' + '

' + ($json.hrSummary.strongAreas || 'None identified') + '

' + '
' + '
' + 'Improvement Areas:' + '

' + ($json.hrSummary.improvementAreas || 'None identified') + '

' + '
' + '
' + 'Job Requirements Match: ' + $json.assessmentResults.jobInfo.requiredSkills + '
' + '
' + 'Assessment Difficulty: ' + $json.assessmentResults.jobInfo.difficulty + '
' + '
' : '' }} {{ $json.assessmentResults.surveyValidation.validationPassed ? '
' + '

📝 Technical Scoring Summary

' + '
' + '
' + '
' + $json.assessmentResults.scores.raw + '
' + '
Correct Answers
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + $json.assessmentResults.scores.total + '
' + '
Total Questions
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + $json.assessmentResults.scores.percentage + '%
' + '
Final Score
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + 'Technical Assessment Details:
' + 'Passing Threshold: ' + $json.assessmentResults.scores.passingThreshold + '% | ' + 'Time Taken: ' + $json.assessmentResults.timing.timeSpentFormatted + ' | ' + 'Average per Question: ' + $json.assessmentResults.timing.averageTimePerQuestion + 's
' + 'Grade Awarded: ' + $json.assessmentResults.scores.grade + ' | ' + 'Security Status: ' + $json.hrSummary.securityStatus + '
' + '
' : '' }}

🎯 Final Recommendation

{{ $json.assessmentResults.recommendation.decision }}

{{ $json.assessmentResults.recommendation.reasoning }}

Suggested Next Steps:
  • {{ $json.assessmentResults.recommendation.nextSteps[0] || 'Review detailed results' }}
  • {{ $json.assessmentResults.recommendation.nextSteps[1] || 'Contact candidate with feedback' }}
    • {{ $json.assessmentResults.recommendation.nextSteps[2] ? '
  • ' + $json.assessmentResults.recommendation.nextSteps[2] + '
    • ' : '' }}

{{ $json.flags.hasSecurityConcerns ? '⚠️ Security Alerts' : '✅ Security Status' }}

{{ $json.flags.hasSecurityConcerns ? 'This assessment has security concerns that require review. Please check the detailed results for violations and irregularities.' : 'Assessment completed without security issues. Candidate followed all proctoring requirements and maintained assessment integrity.' }}

Security Violations: {{ $json.assessmentResults.security.violations.length || 0 }} | Integrity Score: {{ $json.assessmentResults.security.integrityScore }}

⚡ Quick Actions

    {{ $json.assessmentResults.surveyValidation.validationPassed && $json.assessmentResults.scores.isPassed ? '
  • ✅ Schedule technical interview with ' + $json.assessmentResults.candidateInfo.name + '
    • ' + '
  • ✅ Update candidate status to "Proceeding to Round 1"
    • ' + '
  • ✅ Send congratulations email
    • ' : !$json.assessmentResults.surveyValidation.validationPassed ? '
  • ❌ Send preference screening feedback to ' + $json.assessmentResults.candidateInfo.name + '
    • ' + '
  • ❌ Update status to "Not Selected - Preference Requirements"
    • ' + '
  • 📝 Review preference requirements for future candidates
    • ' : '
  • ❌ Send technical assessment feedback to ' + $json.assessmentResults.candidateInfo.name + '
    • ' + '
  • ❌ Update status to "Not Selected - Technical Requirements"
    • ' + '
  • 📝 Consider for different roles with lower technical requirements
    • ' }}
  • Review detailed assessment results in the recruitment system
  • Contact candidate directly: {{ $json.assessmentResults.candidateInfo.email }}
    • {{ $json.flags.hasSecurityConcerns ? '
  • 🔍 Investigate security violations reported during assessment
    • ' : '
  • ✅ No security issues detected - proceed with standard workflow
    • ' }} {{ $json.flags.highPerformer ? '
  • ⭐ Priority candidate - consider fast-track process
    • ' : '' }}
Two-Stage Assessment Metadata:
Screening ID: {{ $json.assessmentResults.screeningId }}
Assessment Completed: {{ $json.assessmentResults.completedAt }}
Results Processed: {{ $json.assessmentResults.processedAt }}
Stage 1 (Survey): {{ $json.hrSummary.surveyResponsesCount || 0 }} questions ({{ $json.hrSummary.qualifyingSurveyQuestionsCount || 0 }} qualifying)
{{ $json.assessmentResults.surveyValidation.validationPassed ? 'Stage 2 (Technical): ' + $json.assessmentResults.scores.total + ' MCQ questions | ' + $json.assessmentResults.timing.timeSpentFormatted + ' duration
' : 'Stage 2 (Technical): Not attempted (blocked by preference screening)
' }} Security Integrity: {{ $json.assessmentResults.security.integrityScore }}
Two-Stage Process: {{ $json.hrSummary.twoStageComplete ? 'Successfully Completed' : 'Partially Completed' }}
Data Source: PostgreSQL database with real candidate data
Scoring Method: Survey validation + Dynamic MCQ scoring (survey answers not scored)
System Version: AI Assessment Platform v8 with Two-Stage Process & Survey Validation
